role_description: Highest facility-level clearance. Authority to oversee institutional performance, approve faculty assignments, and access school-wide student/staff records.
Elevated administrative clearance. Manages day-to-day operational logic, coordinates staff workloads, and modifies scheduling records.
Standard educational staff clearance. Authorized to input grades, log student attendance, and interact with specific classroom modules.
Full tenant-level access within the school framework. Responsible for managing whitelist enrollment, resetting credentials, and reviewing audit logs.
Standard educational staff clearance. Authorized to input grades, log student attendance, and interact with specific classroom modules.
Specialized staff access. Granted permission to read and manage sensitive student behavioral portfolios, wellness logs, and private counseling records.
Technical maintenance clearance. Permissions tailored for infrastructure troubleshooting, hardware mapping, and internal software deployment validations.
Restricted administrative role. Access is bounded tightly to inventory control systems, resource cataloging, and basic facility booking data.
Restricted educational role. Read-only permissions across class sheets, with data entry rights limited to co-signing attendance logs.
Cross-departmental supervisor. Authorized to review curriculum mapping, cross-examine standard grades, and manage exam schedules across departments.
